about.description: Poixe Translate is an open-source translation tool. Based on AI large models, it supports custom model providers and provides reliable translation services.

providers.header: Add model providers, customize API endpoints, and support 4 mainstream protocols.

dialog.name: Name
dialog.models: Model List (separated by commas or new lines)

delete.title: Delete Model Provider
delete.content: Deletion will take effect immediately. After deletion, you will no longer be able to send requests using this provider configuration, and it cannot be recovered.

prompts.header: Used as a system prompt during translation to control terminology and style.

dialog.name: Name
dialog.content_placeholder: You are a professional translator in the finance domain. Requirements: use accurate terminology and a formal tone; keep numbers, code, and proper nouns unchanged.

delete.title: Delete Translation Prompt
delete.content: This action takes effect immediately. After deletion, you will no longer be able to use this translation prompt, and it cannot be recovered.

select_model.dialog_description: Select an AI model to use for translation

select_language.dialog_description: Select the target language for translation

select_prompt.dialog_description: Select the prompt used for translation

error.provider_not_found: The selected provider was not found
error.prompt_not_found: The selected prompt was not found
error.unsupported_api_style: This provider API style is not supported
